description: Enoch wakes May on the Zephyr One, which has been anchored safely during the gravity storm. May, disoriented, is greeted by Robin Hinton, who cryptically says she has waited a long time to see her, setting up mysterious events to come.
location: Zephyr One (S.H.I.E.L.D. quinjet / mobile command plane)

transcript.line: Welcome back, Agent May. You hit your head quite hard.
Where are we? The Zephyr. How? What is going on?
They grabbed us just in time. Anchored us against the gravity storm.
I have waited such a long time to see you again.
